raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "The Sonoma Development Center will empower neighbors, the community, and County of Sonoma to conduct a comprehensive planning process focused on the potential future uses of the site.",
    "The framework for the future of the Sonoma Developmental Center is the result of a three and a half year collaborative process.",
    "This plan ensures a community-driven approach to the reuse of the core campus while preserving undeveloped land as public parkland and open space.",
    "The agreement regarding the Sonoma Developmental Center is claimed to be the first of its kind in the State of California.",
    "The deal outlines state funding for a County-managed Specific Plan land use process that includes a robust community engagement process.",
    "The Sonoma Developmental Center opened in 1891 as a state-run residential care facility dedicated to serving individuals with developmental disabilities.",
    "The property encompasses a developed campus covering approximately 180 acres and approximately 700 acres of open space."
  ]
}
